steps: https://www.tripdatabase.com selected 38 results on 4/02/2025 after 3 separate searches, all restricted to guidelines using left-hand box Search 1 : PICO: P=pregnant OR pregnancy OR perinatal; I=substance use OR substance abuse. Search 2 : substance use disorder pregnancy. Search 3 : Substance abuse.
